---
title: "data-exploration"
author: "Julian Fitz"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## data prep
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(nhlscraper)  ## hockey data -- some other data from
library(sportyR) ## visualize regualation playing surfaces for sports
library(here)
```

```{r grab game data}
## canucks April 1st upset of the Avs

# pbps <- gc_pbps(season = 20252026)

# saveRDS(pbps, file = "2025season.rds")

pbps <- readRDS(here("data/2025season.rds"))

pbps |> filter(typeDescKey == "goal")
```

```{r grab shot data}
## shot data from moneypuck.com
shots_df <- read_csv(here("data/shots_2025.csv"))
shots_df |> select(awayTeamCode) |> unique()

## moneypuck data for canucks april 1st upset against the avalanch
avs_vs_canucks <- shots_df |> filter(awayTeamCode == "VAN") |> filter(homeTeamCode == "COL") |> filter(game_id == 21188)
```

```{r goal locations}
avs_vs_canucks
AvC_goal_df <- avs_vs_canucks |> filter(event == "GOAL")

geom_hockey("nhl") +
  geom_point(data = avs_vs_canucks |> filter(period == 1), 
             aes(x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
                 y = arenaAdjustedYCord)) +
  geom_point(data = AvC_goal_df |> filter(period == 1),
             aes(x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
                 y = arenaAdjustedYCord,
                 color = teamCode),
             size = 5)


plot_df <- pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020) |>
               filter(!is.na(shotType)) |> filter(period == 1) # |>
  mutate(angle = case_when((period == 1 | 3) & (isHome == TRUE) ~  angle + 180,
                           (period == 2) & (isHome == FALSE) ~ angle + 180,
                           (period == 2) & (isHome == TRUE) ~ angle,
                           TRUE ~ angle)
         )
# 2, 3, 5, 6 all pointing wrong
# why?
#
pbps |> group_by(reason) |> summarise(n = n()) |> arrange(desc(n)) |> print(n = 60)
pbps |> filter(gameId = 2024020001) |> filter(reason == "")


geom_hockey("nhl") + ## random gameId
  
  geom_point(data = 
               plot_df, aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord, color = isHome)) +
  
  geom_spoke(data = plot_df, 
             aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord, angle = angle * (pi / 180), radius = distance, color = isHome)) +
  
  geom_spoke(data = plot_df |> filter(scoringPlayerTotal > 0),
             aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord, angle = angle * (pi / 180), radius = distance),
             color = "red", linewidth = 2) +
  
  geom_point(data = plot_df |> filter(scoringPlayerTotal > 0), 
             aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord),
             color = "red", size = 4)

## convert deg to radians and draw a line from the shot position in the angle they shot at
```

```{r heatmap of goals against Avalanch}



# need rows of just shots taken against Colorado and their location

heatmap_df <- shots_df |> filter(homeTeamCode == "COL" | awayTeamCode == "COL") |>
  mutate(team == case_when(homeTeamCode == "COL" ~ "COL",
                           awayTeamCode == "COL" ~ "COL")) |>
  filter(event == "GOAL" | event == "SHOT") |> mutate(shot_results_in_goal = case_when(event == "GOAL" ~ 1,
                                                                        TRUE ~ 0))

ggplot(heatmap_df, aes(x = xCoord))
```

```{r game flow}
# thought
# use geom_line to show shots on goal, danger of shots on goal, expected goals, and/or goals -- as the game progresses
```
